operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO message_peer_sequences (peer_type, peer_id, next_peer_seq, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:peer_type, :peer_id, :next_peer_seq, NOW(6), NOW(6))

operation.name: SelectForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT peer_type, peer_id, next_peer_seq, created_at, updated_at FROM message_peer_sequences WHERE peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

operation.name: UpdateNextPeerSeq
operation.sql: UPDATE message_peer_sequences SET next_peer_seq = :next_peer_seq, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id
